def main() -> None:
    started_at = now_local()
    LOGGER.info("start incremental Tushare refresh")
    pro = get_pro()

    target_trade_date = resolve_target_trade_date(pro, started_at)
    LOGGER.info("resolved target_trade_date=%s", target_trade_date)

    stock_list_report = refresh_stock_list(pro)
    price_report = update_price_history(pro, target_trade_date)
    index_report = update_index_files(pro, target_trade_date)

    payload = {
        "generated_at": started_at.strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),
        "target_trade_date": target_trade_date,
        "price_history": price_report,
        "stock_list": stock_list_report,
        "indices": index_report,
    }
    write_report(payload)

    LOGGER.info(
        "completed target=%s added_price_rows=%s price_updated=%s",
        target_trade_date,
        price_report.get("added_rows", 0),
        price_report.get("updated", False),
    )
    LOGGER.info("report=%s", REPORT_JSON)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

#!/usr/bin/env bash
# 全量面板更新脚本 - 收盘后统一生成所有子面板
# 交易日下午 16:10 运行
set -euo pipefail

ROOT="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")/.." && pwd)"
cd "$ROOT"

# SSL 修复：确保 urllib 可用
SSL_CERT_FILE="$(/usr/local/bin/python3 -c 'import certifi; print(certifi.where())' 2>/dev/null)"
export SSL_CERT_FILE

PYBIN="/usr/local/bin/python3"
LOG_DIR="$ROOT/../logs"
mkdir -p "$LOG_DIR"

log() { echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] $*" >> "$LOG_DIR/all_panels_cron.log"; }

report() {
    local label="$1"
    log "开始: $label"
    local start=$(date +%s)
    if "$PYBIN" "$2" >> "$LOG_DIR/all_panels_cron.log" 2>&1; then
        local dur=$(($(date +%s) - start))
        log "完成: $label (${dur}s)"
    else
        log "失败: $label (exit $?)"
    fi
}

log "========== 全量面板更新开始 =========="

# 纸盘面板（defensive / balanced / aggressive / exit_tight / exit_dual）
report "Defensive纸盘" "$ROOT/scripts/generate_paper_trading_dashboard.py --config $ROOT/config/paper_trading_defensive_v1.json" &
report "Balanced纸盘" "$ROOT/scripts/generate_paper_trading_dashboard.py --config $ROOT/config/paper_trading_balanced_v1.json" &
report "Aggressive纸盘" "$ROOT/scripts/generate_paper_trading_dashboard.py --config $ROOT/config/paper_trading_aggressive_v1.json" &
report "Exit Tight纸盘" "$ROOT/scripts/generate_paper_trading_dashboard.py --config $ROOT/config/paper_trading_exit_candidate_tight_v1.json" &
report "Exit Dual纸盘" "$ROOT/scripts/generate_paper_trading_dashboard.py --config $ROOT/config/paper_trading_exit_candidate_dual_v1.json" &
report "Breadth Strict OOS" "$ROOT/scripts/generate_breadth_strict_oos_dashboard.py" &
report "Breadth Aggressive" "$ROOT/scripts/generate_breadth_aggressive_dashboard.py" &
report "Breadth Comparison" "$ROOT/scripts/generate_breadth_comparison_dashboard.py" &
report "Paper Comparison" "$ROOT/scripts/generate_paper_trading_comparison_dashboard.py" &
report "Control Tower" "$ROOT/scripts/generate_control_tower_daily.py" &
report "CTO Real Data" "$ROOT/scripts/generate_cto_real_data_dashboard.py" &
report "Stock Lens" "$ROOT/scripts/generate_stock_lens_dashboard.py" &
report "Strategy Panel" "$ROOT/scripts/generate_strategy_performance_panel.py" &

# 等待所有后台任务完成（最多300秒）
wait
log "所有面板任务完成"

# 最后更新入口面板（必须在所有子面板之后）
log "开始: Dashboard Portal"
"$PYBIN" "$ROOT/scripts/generate_dashboard_portal.py" >> "$LOG_DIR/all_panels_cron.log" 2>&1 && log "完成: Dashboard Portal" || log "失败: Dashboard Portal"
log "========== 全量面板更新结束 =========="
